allow: Bash(tree em-skill -L -I 'node_modules' 2>/dev/null || find em-skill -type d | sort)

Bash(chmod +x /Users/abc/Desktop/EM-Skill/em-skill/hooks/pre-commit /Users/abc/Desktop/EM-Skill/em-skill/hooks/commit-msg /Users/abc/Desktop/EM-Skill/em-skill/hooks/pre-push && chmod +x /Users/abc/Desktop/EM-Skill/em-skill/commands/*.sh && echo "✓ All scripts made executable")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial commit: EM-Skill Fullstack Engineering Agent System v1.1.0

Features:
- 16 specialized agents \(8 core + 8 specialized\) with duck: triggers
- 16 end-to-end workflows \(8 primary + 8 team\)
- 25+ reusable skills organized by category
- 16 CLI commands \(8 core + 8 team\)
- Team-in-a-box capability for full engineering team simulation
- Iron Laws and quality gates
- MCP integrations \(GitHub, Context7, Exa, Memory, Playwright\)
- Browser automation and visual QA
- Cross-session learning system

Team Agents:
- Team Lead \(duck:team-lead\) - Orchestrator
- Architect \(duck:architect\) - Architecture & technical design
- Frontend Expert \(duck:frontend\) - React/Next.js, UI/UX
- Senior Code Reviewer \(duck:code-review\) - 9-axis deep review
- Database Expert \(duck:database\) - Schema, queries, fintech patterns
- Product Manager \(duck:product\) - Requirements, GAP analysis
- Security Reviewer \(duck:security\) - OWASP, STRIDE, blocking authority
- Staff Engineer \(duck:staff\) - Root cause, cross-service impact

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git rm --cached -r Product-Manager-Skills agent-skills everything-claude-code get-shit-done gstack superpowers)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
chore: remove other repos, keep only em-skill

- Remove Product-Manager-Skills, agent-skills, everything-claude-code, get-shit-done, gstack, superpowers

EOF
\)")
